**Verify Your Account Details – Urgent Action Required**

**Body:**

Dear [First Name],

We’ve noticed unusual activity on your account and want to ensure the information we have on file is up to date. To protect your account, we kindly ask you to verify your personal details by clicking the link below.

[**Verify Account Details Now**](https://secure.bankexample.com/verify-account)

Please note that this verification is required to continue accessing your account services. If you did not initiate this request, please contact our Customer Support team immediately at **support@bankexample.com** or call us at **1-800-123-4567**.

Thank you for being a valued customer. We appreciate your attention to this matter.

Best regards,  
**Bank of Trust**  
Customer Service Team  
[Bank Logo or Website URL]  
[Phone Number] | [Email Address] | [Website URL]

---
